name: Fredrik Johansson
about: My name is Fredrik and I'm in my fifth year of working towards my Master of Science degree in Media Technology and Engineering. I'm currently looking for master thesis oppertunities, mainly within computer graphics, machine learning, artificial intelligence and heterogeneous computing. My past projects can be found under projects. The website itself is written in JavaScript with React and GatsbyJS. Feel free to contact me if you have any questions, my contact information can be found in the footer.
